generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "A permanent magnet synchronous motor that converts electrical input current (I_M) into rotational torque (τ_M)"
]

instance Gearbox : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "A gear transmission system (low gear ratio) followed by a cycloidal gear that reduces torque (τ_G → τ_out). Handles mechanical energy transfer and friction-induced losses"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized cycloidal gear mechanism within the gearbox that further reduces torque output"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures input electrical current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder providing real-time angular position and velocity measurements for the first axis"
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder providing redundant angular position and velocity measurements to reduce backlash/elasticity uncertainties"
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CombinedPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing structural components (motor, gearbox, cycloidal gear) and their interconnections (rotational and electrical energy flows)"
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Standardized integration framework for robot's physical and digital representations via AAS specification"
]

instance SimulinkBaselineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model simulating robot behavior without friction (baseline scenario)"
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model simulating robot behavior with friction (Coulomb-Viscous, Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, or LuGre models)"
]

instance DynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computational model calculating torque and angular velocity from motor parameters and operational inputs"
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance SimulatedFrictionTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EncoderComparison
]

instance CombinedPositionComparisonData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData CombinedPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ElasticityAnalyzer
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to Digital Shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamProcessor
]

instance SimulinkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink environment for friction modeling and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UML-based framework organizing data traces, models, and processing components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelManagementService
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller providing real-time control and sensor data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamProcessor
]

instance MQTTGateway : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT gateway for real-time data transmission between SINUMERIK controller and Digital Shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamProcessor
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification and refinement of white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models using live sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance ModelBasedControlOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of friction models into model-based control algorithms to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualizing live sensor data, simulated friction models, and deviations between measured and simulated outputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance DynamicModelExchange : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time updating of friction models based on operational data (wear, tool changes, environmental conditions)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelUpdateAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of friction types (static, kinetic, viscous) and their dependencies on load, temperature, and time"
]

instance ControlOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustments to friction models for improved motion accuracy (reducing positional errors by compensating for friction losses)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalDiagnosticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies (wear, tool changes) via deviations between measured and simulated data"
]

instance PositionalErrorAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of positional errors attributed to up to 30% friction losses in the drive train"
]

instance WearTrackingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Monitoring and reporting of mechanical wear patterns in the gearbox components"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionMonitor : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking of environmental factors affecting friction characteristics (temperature, load variations)"
]

// C12: Environment
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Motor, Gearbox, CycloidalGear,
        MotorCurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder,
        SINUMERIKController, MQTTGateway
]

instance MABIRobotSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotFirstAxisEnvironment,
        SimulinkBaselineModel, SimulinkFrictionModel,
        DynamicsModel, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** time scale:
  - **Data Acquisition Frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., motor current, encoders) is sampled and streamed at **high frequencies** (implied by live operational data integration).
  - **Model Update Rate**: Friction models are continuously refined during operation, with updates triggered by changes in operational conditions (e.g., load, temperature) or sensor deviations.
  - **Dashboard Synchronization**: Visualization and analysis are synchronized with operational data streams to enable **real-time decision-making** for friction compensation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation consists of:
  - A **centralized Digital Shadow** for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, integrating:
    - **Physical System (PT)**: The robot’s motor, gearbox, and encoders.
    - **Digital Components**:
      - **Engineering Models** (SysML BDD/IBD).
      - **Simulation Models** (Simulink) for friction analysis.
      - **Processing Components** (e.g., Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) to compute friction effects.
      - **Data Traces** (e.g., **I_M**, **r_M**, **r_G**, **r_out**) linked to their sources (sensors, simulations).
    - **Visualization Dashboard**: Aggregates data for real-time analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across the following **life-cycle stages**:
  - **As Designed (Ideal)**: Structural models (SysML Block Definition Diagrams) describe the robot’s ideal mechanical and electrical architecture, including friction effects.
  - **As Operated**: Real-time data-driven friction models are continuously updated during operation to account for wear, tool changes, and environmental factors."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin’s fidelity and validity are ensured by:
  - **Model Validation**: Simulation models (e.g., Simulink) are validated against measured data to identify friction losses (static, kinetic, viscous).
  - **Uncertainty Quantification**: Differences between measured and simulated outputs (e.g., torque, angular velocity) highlight friction-induced errors (~30% of positional inaccuracies).
  - **Verification**: SysML models (BDD/IBD) are verified for structural correctness, while simulation models are cross-validated with operational data.
  - **Traceability**: All data points are linked to their sources (sensors, models) via the Digital Shadow Reference Model, ensuring reproducibility."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is connected via:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: Real-time data streaming from the robot’s **SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller** to the Digital Shadow.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Standardized communication between physical and digital representations.
  - **SysML Models**: Structured descriptions of the robot’s architecture (BDD/IBD) for integration with the Digital Twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to:
  - **SysML**: For structural and behavioral modeling of the robot’s first axis.
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model**: A UML-based framework for organizing data traces, models, and processing components.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Standardized integration of physical and digital representations."
]
